summary: Frontend testing complete for POI stop position insertion feature. All new buttons verified in POI Detail Modal: 'Add as Next Stop' (inserts at position 0), position selector dropdown (Stop #1 through Stop #N), 'Add at #' button, '+ Deadhead', '+ Paid', and 'Navigate Directly'. Functionality tested: adding multiple stops and using position selector to insert at specific positions. Route recalculates correctly after adding waypoints.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 2023-2042 - addWaypoint() function correctly accepts optional position parameter and uses Array.splice() to insert at specific index

VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 3565-3622 - Leaflet popup HTML includes 'Add as Next Stop' button with data-position='0', position selector dropdown, 'Add at #' button with data-use-select='true', and '+ Deadhead'/'+ Paid' buttons
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 3667-3698 - Event delegation handler correctly reads data-position and data-use-select attributes to determine insertion position
VERIFIED: PoiDetailModal.tsx line 1-23 - Interface updated with waypointCount prop and stopPosition state
VERIFIED: PoiDetailModal.tsx line 274-327 - New action buttons layout with 'Add as Next Stop', position selector, Deadhead/Paid, Navigate Directly
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 4159 - waypointCount prop correctly passed to PoiDetailModal

features_tested.poi_detail_modal_add_next_stop_button: PASS - Button visible with data-testid='poi-add-next-stop', inserts at position 0
features_tested.poi_detail_modal_position_selector: PASS - Dropdown visible with data-testid='poi-stop-position-select', shows Stop #1 through Stop #N
features_tested.poi_detail_modal_deadhead_button: PASS - Button visible with data-testid='poi-add-deadhead', appends to end
features_tested.poi_detail_modal_paid_button: PASS - Button visible with data-testid='poi-add-paid', appends to end
features_tested.leaflet_popup_html_structure: PASS - Code verified: popup HTML includes all new buttons (Add as Next Stop, position select, Add at #, Deadhead, Paid)
features_tested.add_waypoint_position_insertion: PASS - addWaypoint() correctly uses Array.splice() for position-based insertion
features_tested.multiple_stops_addition: PASS - Successfully added 3 stops using different methods
features_tested.position_selector_functionality: PASS - Selected Stop #1 and inserted waypoint at position 0
features_tested.route_recalculation: PASS - Route recalculated after adding waypoints (distance and time updated)
features_tested.waypoint_count_display: PASS - Bottom bar shows correct stop count (2 -> 3 stops)

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://truck-gps-demo.preview.emergentagent.com. POI stop position insertion feature fully implemented and tested. Key test flow: Guest login -> Navigation -> search 'Chicago' -> ROUTE -> click POI from 'Along Route' list -> verify POI Detail Modal has new buttons (Add as Next Stop, position selector, Add at #, Deadhead, Paid, Navigate Directly). The Leaflet map popup also has these buttons but clicking a marker opens the POI Detail Modal instead (popup shows on hover). addWaypoint() function accepts optional position parameter for splice insertion. Position selector dropdown shows Stop #1 through Stop #N based on current waypoint count.
